name: Mermaid Parade
notes: Annual summer-solstice art parade. One-off, date-fixed — watch from the boardwalk.

name: Ladyland
notes: Queer music festival (Avant Gardner / Brooklyn Mirage). One-off, ticketed.

name: Seneca Village Juneteenth
notes: Free outdoor Juneteenth performance, 82nd–89th St (CPW). One-off, date-fixed.

name: NYC Drag March
notes: Pride-weekend march, Tompkins Square Park → Stonewall. One-off, date-fixed.

name: NYC Pride March & PrideFest
notes: NYC Pride March (noon, 26th & 5th) plus the PrideFest street festival. One-off, date-fixed.
